name: TMDB
author: Chronicle Contributors
description: Fetches movie and TV metadata from The Movie Database (TMDB). Requires a free TMDB API key.
fixMatchHint: Enter a TMDB URL or typed ID. For movies: https://www.themoviedb.org/movie/550 or movie:550. For TV shows: https://www.themoviedb.org/tv/1399 or tv:1399. For episodes: https://www.themoviedb.org/tv/1399/season/1/episode/3 or tv:1399/season:1/episode:3.

background_tasks.description: Looks up metadata from TMDB for newly imported movies and TV shows that don't have it yet.
Re-downloads all TMDB metadata to pick up updated titles, posters, and ratings.
